Class DefaultProver<Proof extends ProofObject<Goal>, Goal extends @Nullable ProofGoal<Goal>>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.engine.AbstractProverCore<Proof,Goal>
org.key_project.prover.engine.impl.DefaultProver<Proof,Goal>
Type Parameters:
Proof - the type of ProofObject that the prover constructs
Goal - the type of ProofGoal instances manipulated by this prover
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProverCore<Proof,Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
ApplyStrategy
public abstract class DefaultProver<Proof extends ProofObject<Goal>, Goal extends @Nullable ProofGoal<Goal>> extends AbstractProverCore<Proof,Goal>

A default implementation of a prover that provides reusable functionality for constructing and manipulating proofs by applying rules to goals.

This class can be subclassed to define custom provers with specific strategies and behaviors for proof construction.

    doWork(GoalChooser<Proof,Goal> goalChooser, StopCondition<Goal> stopCondition)

    • PERF_GOAL_APPLY

      public static final AtomicLong PERF_GOAL_APPLY
      Counter for tracking performance metrics related to goal application.

    • proof

      protected @MonotonicNonNull Proof extends ProofObject<Goal> proof
      The proof currently being constructed or manipulated by this prover.

    • maxApplications

      protected int maxApplications
      The maximum number of rule applications allowed during the proof process.

    • time

      protected long time
      The start time of the most recent prover invocation, measured in milliseconds.

    • timeout

      protected long timeout
      The timeout duration, in milliseconds, after which rule application will be aborted. A value of -1 disables the timeout.

    • stopAtFirstNonClosableGoal

      protected boolean stopAtFirstNonClosableGoal
      Indicates whether the prover should stop as soon as a non-closable goal is detected.

    • closedGoals

      protected int closedGoals
      The number of goals closed during the current proof process.

    • cancelled

      protected boolean cancelled
      Indicates whether the prover has been interrupted and should stop.

    • stopCondition

      protected @Nullable StopCondition<Goal extends @Nullable ProofGoal<Goal>> stopCondition
      A condition that determines whether the prover should stop its execution.

    • goalChooser

      protected @Nullable GoalChooser<Proof extends ProofObject<Goal>, Goal extends @Nullable ProofGoal<Goal>> goalChooser
      A strategy component that selects the next goal to be processed.

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultProver

      public DefaultProver()

  • Method Details

    • updateBuiltInRuleIndex

      protected abstract @Nullable RuleApp updateBuiltInRuleIndex(Goal goal, @Nullable RuleApp app)

      This is currently a hook method for the JavaDL prover as according to a comment the built-in-rule index is not updated when rules are applied.

      Ultimately, this has to be fixed in the listener structure of JavaDL. But for the moment we move it up. Other implementations should implement this method as an empty method.

      Parameters:
      goal - the Goal currently being processed
      app - the RuleApp to be applied next (if null, the built-in-rule index is updated and queried whether a built-in rule is applicable)
      Returns:
      the next RuleApp to apply, or null if no rule is applicable

    • doWork

      protected final ApplyStrategyInfo<Proof,Goal> doWork(GoalChooser<Proof,Goal> goalChooser, StopCondition<Goal> stopCondition)
      Executes the proof strategy by applying rules to goals until no further rules can be applied, a stop condition is met, or the thread is interrupted.
      Parameters:
      goalChooser - the GoalChooser that determines the next goal to process
      stopCondition - the StopCondition that dictates when the prover should stop
      Returns:
      an ApplyStrategyInfo instance containing details about the proof process

    • applyAutomaticRule

      protected final SingleRuleApplicationInfo applyAutomaticRule(GoalChooser<Proof,Goal> goalChooser, StopCondition<Goal> stopCondition, long startTime, boolean stopAtFirstNonClosableGoal)
      Applies rules to goals using the active strategy until a stopping condition is met.
      Parameters:
      goalChooser - the GoalChooser for selecting the next goal
      stopCondition - the StopCondition to evaluate during processing
      startTime - the start time of the current proof process, in milliseconds
      stopAtFirstNonClosableGoal - whether to stop if a non-closable goal is detected
      Returns:
      a SingleRuleApplicationInfo instance containing the result of the rule application
